message:
feat(firecracker): add TailscaleState to MMDS

MMDS can now include pre-registered Tailscale state (base64).
VMs can use this to reconnect instantly instead of registering.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -282,6 +282,7 @@ func (c *Client) CreateVM(ctx context.Context, config *VMConfig) (*VMInfo, error
 		SSHAuthorizedKeys: config.SSHAuthorizedKeys,
 		UserData:          config.CloudInitData,
 		NetworkConfig:     config.NetworkMMDS,
+		TailscaleState:    config.TailscaleState,
 	})
 	if err := apiClient.SetMMDSData(ctx, mmdsData); err != nil {
 		cmd.Process.Kill()
@@ -617,6 +618,7 @@ func (c *Client) StartVM(ctx context.Context, config *VMConfig) (*VMInfo, error)
 		SSHAuthorizedKeys: config.SSHAuthorizedKeys,
 		UserData:          config.CloudInitData,
 		NetworkConfig:     config.NetworkMMDS,
+		TailscaleState:    config.TailscaleState,
 	})
 	if err := apiClient.SetMMDSData(ctx, mmdsData); err != nil {
 		cmd.Process.Kill()
